channel.title: Epicenter Exchange — Insights
channel.description: Slow, data-grounded essays on markets and money. One essay every fortnight. Free, ad-free, no tracking.

item.title: SEBI's F&O rules 18 months on: what the data actually shows
item.description: Six measures, retail losses of ₹1.81 lakh crore, and what 18 months of post-rollout data tells us about SEBI's F&O reforms. With SEBI sources.

item.title: NIFTY 50 vs S&P 500: 25 years of real numbers
item.description: Currency-adjusted, drawdown-adjusted long-term comparison of NIFTY 50 against the S&P 500 for Indian investors.

item.title: Best tax-saving investments in India 2026
item.description: ELSS vs PPF vs NPS vs ULIP. The post-tax CAGR table, with the math.

item.title: Why 89% of day traders lose money
item.description: SEBI's data on 9.5 lakh F&O traders. Why retail intraday is structurally negative-EV.

item.title: SIP vs Lumpsum in India 2026
item.description: A data-driven look at 25 years of NIFTY data to settle the SIP-vs-lumpsum question for Indian investors.

item.title: Bitcoin halving cycles, explained
item.description: Why the four-year halving cycle exists, what the data actually shows, and what it can't predict.

item.title: XIRR vs CAGR — which one matters?
item.description: Two return numbers, one shows what you actually earned. Worked examples in INR.
